notes: OpenAI reasoning worker; run at xhigh when reviewing the other family's code. Costs and context are anchored to the GPT-5 family; the sol version's exact per-Mtok rate is unconfirmed. Qualified as orchestrator at xhigh or above.
Strong Claude worker. Priced at the Opus family rate; the 1M window is the extended-context variant, standard is 200000. Confirm the sol-vs-opus figures if a tie turns on them.
Cheaper Claude worker for tasks with a checkable right answer. Costs anchored to the Sonnet family; sonnet-5 exact rate unconfirmed.
Orchestrator seat, plus the panel's CLI seats; never a worker dispatch. Pricing is not published; the Opus-tier figures here are a placeholder, treat as top-tier cost.
Candidate orchestrator model, not yet adopted. Costs and context are anchored to Kimi K2; the k3 figures are unconfirmed.
